import{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{episodesAPI}from'../services/endpoints';export const useEpisodes=()=>{const[episodes,setEpisodes]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState(null);const fetchEpisodes=async()=>{try{setLoading(true);setError(null);const data=await episodesAPI.getAll();setEpisodes(data);}catch(err){console.error('Failed to fetch episodes:',err);setError(err.message||'Failed to load episodes');}finally{setLoading(false);}};const generateEpisode=async function(topic){let options=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};try{const newEpisode=await episodesAPI.generate(topic,options);// Refresh episodes list after generation
await fetchEpisodes();return newEpisode;}catch(err){console.error('Failed to generate episode:',err);throw err;}};useEffect(()=>{fetchEpisodes();},[]);return{episodes,loading,error,refetch:fetchEpisodes,generate:generateEpisode};};
